languages.text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.
languages.original_text: Все ресурсы этого некрона направлены на защиту Музеона. Протокол реанимации отключен.

traits.locale_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

languages.text: Все ресурсы этого некрона направлены на защиту Музеона. Протокол реанимации отключен.
Todos los recursos de este Necrón están destinados a la defensa del Museion. El protocolo de reanimación está desactivado.
languages.original_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

traits.locale_text: Todos los recursos de este Necrón están destinados a la defensa del Museion. El protocolo de reanimación está desactivado.

languages.text: 这名太空死灵已将全部资源投入到陈列馆的防御中。重塑协议已被禁用。
languages.original_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

traits.locale_text: 这名太空死灵已将全部资源投入到陈列馆的防御中。重塑协议已被禁用。

languages.text: Toutes les ressources de ce Nécron ont été allouées à la défense du Muséion. Le protocole de réanimation a été désactivé.
languages.original_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

traits.locale_text: Toutes les ressources de ce Nécron ont été allouées à la défense du Muséion. Le protocole de réanimation a été désactivé.

languages.text: Bu Nekron'un tüm kaynakları, Museion'un savunmasına aktarıldı. Canlandırma protokolü devre dışı bırakıldı.
languages.original_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

traits.locale_text: Bu Nekron'un tüm kaynakları, Museion'un savunmasına aktarıldı. Canlandırma protokolü devre dışı bırakıldı.

languages.text: ネクロンの全資源がミュゼイオンの防衛に注がれている。蘇生プロトコルは停止されている。
languages.original_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

traits.locale_text: ネクロンの全資源がミュゼイオンの防衛に注がれている。蘇生プロトコルは停止されている。

languages.text: Alle Ressourcen dieses Necrons wurden für die Verteidigung des Museions eingesetzt. Das Reanimationsprotokoll wurde deaktiviert.
languages.original_text: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.

traits.locale_text: Alle Ressourcen dieses Necrons wurden für die Verteidigung des Museions eingesetzt. Das Reanimationsprotokoll wurde deaktiviert.
